name: sandbox
description: Secure code execution and shell commands via microsandbox (VM-level OCI isolation). Supersedes the Go shell service.

tools.name: sandbox.execute
tools.description: Execute Python or Node.js code in a secure OCI sandbox (VM-level isolation via microsandbox). Use for data processing, calculations, API calls, or scripting. Each call starts a fresh sandbox — state is not preserved between calls.

tools.name: sandbox.shell
tools.description: Run a shell command in a secure OCI sandbox (VM-level isolation via microsandbox). Safe alternative to direct host execution. Use for file operations, package inspection, or running binaries.

command.description: Shell command to execute (bash/sh). Example: 'ls -la /tmp && echo done'
